vocab.meaning: trí tưởng tượng không giới hạn/tự do
vocab.example: As a child, my unfettered imagination led me to spend entire afternoons building elaborate forts out of cardboard boxes.

vocab.meaning: thiên hướng sớm đối với cái gì
vocab.example: I displayed an early inclination towards the arts, often sketching portraits of my family members on any scrap of paper I could find.

vocab.meaning: một công việc làm vì đam mê chứ không vì lợi ích
vocab.example: Maintaining my scrapbooks was a true labor of love; I meticulously organized every single sticker and cut-out.

vocab.meaning: mải mê/chìm đắm vào cái gì
vocab.example: I would be so engrossed in my stamp collection that I would often lose track of time and skip dinner.
I have a vivid recollection of the day my father bought me my first telescope, which sparked my interest in astronomy.

vocab.meaning: một sở thích/hoạt động theo đuổi đơn độc
vocab.example: Reading was my favorite solitary pursuit, providing a peaceful escape from the rowdy games played by other children in the neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động thực hành/chạm tay vào làm thực tế
vocab.example: I was always fond of hands-on activities, particularly pottery, where I could mold clay into various eccentric shapes.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng/trau dồi một tài năng
vocab.example: My parents encouraged me to cultivate a talent for the violin, though I must admit I lacked the discipline back then.
My adventurous spirit as a youth manifested in my hobby of exploring local woods and mapping out 'secret' trails.

vocab.meaning: kết nối/thân thiết với ai đó thông qua cái gì
vocab.example: My best friend and I managed to form a bond over our shared hobby of trading rare baseball cards during recess.
